title: bromelia humilis
intro: Bromelia humilis, also known as the Dwarf Pineapple or Pineapple Bromeliad, is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the Bromeliaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are believed to help in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bromelia humilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
